title: send_payment params=None footgun: production callers can pass None without compile error
description: payment.rs:164: params: Option<&(SpendParameters, OutputParameters)>. The Option is documented as test-only but there is no compile-time enforcement. A production caller passing None will get through sync-lag check, note selection, and address parsing, then fail at proof generation with a ParamsNotLoaded error. This is confusing because the payment appears to proceed until the last step. Suggested fix: use a separate entry point or a newtype that is only constructable with loaded params, making None impossible for production paths.
